security._note: CSP temporarily disabled for Phase 0 preview diagnostics. v0.0.0-preview.4 launched to a blank window on Windows, most likely because the previous CSP was missing 'wasm-unsafe-eval' and WebView2 silently blocked the Dioxus WASM bundle. Setting csp=null rules CSP out entirely as a suspect; we'll pin a proper script-src / wasm-unsafe-eval / connect-src policy once we confirm the bundle otherwise renders.

bundle.shortDescription: Capytain — a Rust-native desktop email client.
bundle.longDescription: Capytain is an experimental desktop email client written end-to-end in Rust. Phase 0 scaffolding.
